explanations.34: seriesMap is an empty object that will store blog posts grouped by their series name, like a filing cabinet where each series gets its own drawer.
explanations.56: We create a copy of the posts array using the spread operator (...) so we can sort it without changing the original order of posts in seriesMap.
explanations.70: The optional chaining operator (?.) safely checks if the first sorted post exists and has an image; if not, it falls back to the defaultImage instead of crashing.
